summary: BTC Tools | Multicast Mapping | Navigate to Multicast Mapping
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the BTC Tools tile
And the user clicks on the "Configs" tab on the top navigation
And the user clicks on the Multicast Mapping
Then the user lands on the Schedule page
And the user should see "Pipeline", "Pipeline Input", "Skyview" and "Multicast Mapping" tab
And the Multicast Mapping table displays headers: {{ID}}, {{Call Sign}}, {{Priority}}, {{Source Location}}, {{Multicast Address}}, {{HDR Multicast Address}}

steps.action:
*When* the user clicks on the BTC Tools tile 

*And*  the user clicks on the "Configs" tab on the top navigation

*And* the user clicks on the Multicast Mapping
